question_text: What is the definition of wavelength?

options.label: A
options.text: The distance between two consecutive points that are in phase, such as from one peak to the next peak

options.label: B
options.text: The maximum displacement of a particle from its rest position

options.label: C
options.text: The number of complete waves that pass a point in one second

options.label: D
options.text: The speed at which a wave travels through a medium

explanation: Wavelength is the distance between two consecutive points in phase on a wave, commonly measured from peak to peak or trough to trough. The other options describe amplitude, frequency, and wave speed respectively.
